TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrea_Bargnani, title = Andrea_Bargnani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrea_Bargnani} }

S.FORM: Andrea Bargnani sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 10, Andrea Bargnani, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Andrea Bargnani sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 10, Andrea Bargnani, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: an*rea ő≤ar…£nani s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, an*rea ő≤ar…£nani, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
